So what did I do? I changed my approach instead of having just Leo on the Ad I used a combination of Leo connecting to me and ended with me Saying what so it was me giving the call to action and me saying you come here and teach you about the system okay, that will help you close anyone who's closeable all right and Boom you go to the ad now and there it is the proven sales training system for closing anyone who's closeable Right and just like that my conversion rate skyrocketed went through the roof Okay, so again, I want you to you must be very very careful that your end and go back to the ad Now again for me just you know, it's a bit more challenging for you Because I have so now I have so many ads out there. They want to have a company a really top marketing company Investigates it. This is the problem we have with this platform is that there's very slow load times on the platform So what happens they say it is like this they've done this study if the load time is in excess of four seconds Four seconds your conversion rate goes down by 80% so those someone clicks watch you click on this link right here boom This thing this one now comes up if this video doesn't stop playing within four seconds or it doesn't load slow load No one's gonna buy from you Okay, so again be very careful with what platform you go on there are some good ones There's some bad ones. So what was my solution? My solution was I'm a long-term player So I actually paid I made the investment and had someone who was the top builder of Online sales in the world in terms of high-speed funnels and had them design and I had custom made code Just for my funnel that was playing this for the long term You don't have to do that. There are some good companies out there that will host your funnel for you But for me as you know, I want to be the master of my own destiny So I designed and you know much cost five thousand dollars. But the point is my load time is 300 milliseconds So I don't lose one if someone doesn't buy now.
